sourceLocation.lineSourceLocationTarget: project-local LINE 對話主檔 or LINE 對話組檔 page
sourceLocation.fileSourceLocationTarget: keep file/document links inside the matching 來源原文 block
doNot: store only a plain group name when a conversation page URL is known
link only to the task page when a source conversation page exists
replace file attachment links with source-location text

lineSourceOriginal.sourceOfTruth: project-local LINE 對話主檔 or LINE 對話組檔
lineSourceOriginal.copyRule: copy the complete source message block into the matching evidence record
doNot: move images to a separate attachment section
expand document contents inside 來源原文
lineSourceOriginal.standardHumanMessageHeader: 【日期時間】群組名稱 - 發言人（訊息格式）

mediaRules.image: embed directly in 來源原文 using the same image markdown or project-local image reference as the LINE conversation master
mediaRules.document: preserve file name and attachment link; do not expand file contents
mediaRules.sticker: preserve sticker package/id and shop link when available
mediaRules.other: copy only when needed as evidence for a judgment
